name: Kalandra's Touch
explicitMods: Reflects opposite Ring
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Screams of the Desiccated
explicitMods: You have Diamond Shrine Buff while affected by no Flasks
+31 to Intelligence
+29% to Chaos Resistance
flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants armour to you and your allies.
explicitMods: +2 metres to radius
You and nearby allies gain 1077 additional Armour
You and nearby allies gain 50% more Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that causes nearby enemies to take more physical damage.
explicitMods: +1 metre to radius
40% increased Area of Effect

Nearby Enemies take at least 20% more Physical Damage,
 raising up to 40% as they stay in the Aura for 4 seconds
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: Base Aura radius is 2.8 metres
63% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Woespike
implicitMods: Adds 4 to 16 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: +39 to Strength and Dexterity
Adds 9 to 25 Physical Damage to Attacks
20% chance to Impale Enemies on Hit with Attacks
25% chance on Melee Hit for the Strongest Impale on target to last for 1 additional Hit
42% less Impale Duration
flavourText: The old wound lurks deep within,
never healing, never relenting,
making every smile half-hearted.

implicitMods: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 10 Fortify

15% reduced Attack Speed
Curse Enemies with Vulnerability on Hit
Exerted Attacks Knock Enemies Back on Hit
flavourText: We feel the Mother's love
and beg to return to her womb.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Must support both a channelling skill and a non-channelling spell skill to work. The channelling skill will trigger a spell periodically while channelling. Supported Triggered Spells deal 10% increased Damage

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.

Base duration is 4.00 seconds
Spawns 5 corpses
Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 20
Maximum of 10 corpses allowed

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: Base duration is 3.00 seconds
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3270% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
Buff grants +909 to Armour
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Base duration is 9.00 seconds
Modifiers to Skill Effect Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention

40% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 20% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 10000

Reflects 9810% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage each second,
or when Buff expires or is depleted
Buff grants +909 to Armour
hybrid.secDescrText: Applies a buff that raises your armour, and takes some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. Each second, the skill deals reflected damage to surrounding enemies based on the damage taken by the buff in that second. When the buff is removed, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken by the buff. You cannot have the buff at the same time as any other Guard skill.

socketedItems.secDescrText: You must gain Valour from melee combat to use this skill, which will consume all Valour to place a banner with an aura.
